name: Supademo Interactive Demo API
what_it_does: AI-powered interactive demo creation platform with API — enabling teams to create screenshot-based product demos from browser recordings, add AI-generated voiceovers and text, customize with branding, share with analytics, and embed interactive demos on websites, in emails, and Notion.
use_cases: Querying demo view analytics and completion rates for content performance tracking
Managing demo collections and sharing with sales team via API
Integrating Supademo engagement data with CRM for prospect activity tracking
Automating demo organization and workspace management for large teams
Syncing demo analytics with marketing attribution for conversion analysis
not_for: Live demo environments requiring actual product functionality (use Demostack)
Video-first screen recording (use Loom for video)
Enterprise interactive demos with deep customization (use Reprise or Navattic)
best_when: A startup or SMB product marketing or sales team wants AI-assisted, screenshot-based interactive demos quickly for use in outreach, websites, and onboarding at an affordable price.
avoid_when: You need live sandbox environments, complex branching demo flows, or enterprise white-glove demo production.

auth.notes: API key from Supademo account. Bearer token auth. Workspace-scoped access. No OAuth2 or webhooks. Demo creation via Chrome extension UI. API provides data access and management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 5 demos, Supademo branding, limited analytics
pricing.notes: Y Combinator-backed company. Founded 2022. AI voiceover generation from text. Multiple language support. Notion and HubSpot integrations. Fastest time-to-demo in the category. Very competitive pricing vs Arcade or Storylane. Strong in early-stage companies and growth-stage SaaS.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for demos, workspaces, and analytics. Bearer token auth. Limited public API documentation. Demo creation via Chrome extension. API primarily for analytics access and demo management. No webhooks — implement polling for analytics updates.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Demo reads fully idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. Workspace reads idempotent. All read operations safe to retry.
known_agent_gotchas: Demo creation requires Chrome extension — API is read-only for demo content
No webhooks — polling required for analytics updates
AI voiceover generation is UI-triggered — API cannot trigger voiceover
Free tier has Supademo branding on demos — remove requires paid plan
Analytics processing has multi-hour delay after demo views

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Product screenshots may contain sensitive UI — review before sharing publicly. Viewer analytics track user behavior — implement consent for EU visitors.
